DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF ANDRE CHANDRA'S APPLICATION FOR A RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS GRANTED. BY FILING THE OPPOSITION TO THE APPLICATION ON JULY 23, 2008, LESS THAN FIVE COURT DAYS PRIOR TO THE DATE SET FOR HEARING, DEFENDANT IS NOT PERMITTED TO OPPOSE THE ISSUANCE OF THE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 484.060. APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Brian Hilliard, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Andre Chandra

No other appearance stated, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Andre Chandra's application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment is granted. By filing the opposition to the application on July 23, 2008, less than five court days prior to the date set for hearing, defendant is not permitted to oppose the issuance of the order pursuant to CCP Section 484.060. Plaintiff shall file an undertaking in the amount of $10,000. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
